name: components/tabulator-table
description: A high-performance data-table component powered by the Tabulator library, wrapped in a SolidJS component with reactive options and lifecycle callbacks. Accepts Tabulator Options (or an accessor) via initOptions, exposes onInit and onDestroy callbacks, and injects CSS custom properties for row-height theming. Ideal for massive datasets requiring virtual scrolling, inline editing, grouping, and advanced filtering without building a custom table from scratch.
useCases: Financial back-office tools with thousands of rows, grouping, and Excel-like inline editing
Inventory management grids with real-time WebSocket updates and virtual scrolling
CRM contact lists requiring column filters, sorters, and persistent user preferences
Scientific data browsers with nested row trees, movable columns, and CSV export
